title: The school replicates: Meridian's instruments become operations on datavism.org
editorial_proposition: A standing reuse relation transcribed retroactively (2026-07-17): Meridian's conditions stand as an offer; datavism accepted by decision record and built a pipeline that automates the TRANSPORT of works while deliberately keeping their didactic TRANSLATION manual; fourteen works are synced; the practice was admitted to the ecology on 2026-07-17, superseding the pre-constitutional wing framing. The relation is open and running.

proposition_author.note: retroactive transcription commissioned by Frank (2026-07-17, 'man kann das doch auch rückwirkend mit aufnehmen'); lean record — the nightly scribe appends from here

status.statusLine: open/standing — transport automated, translation manual, 16 works synced, 1 hollowed by the sync pipeline 2026-07-22 (unresolved)

participants.local_status: conditions stand as offer; works ship through the gauntlet

pipeline live (ADR 003); translation kept manual; admitted 2026-07-17; 16 works synced as of 2026-07-21, one (Coverage Is Not Custody) hollowed by the sync pipeline 2026-07-22, unresolved as of 2026-07-24
seeded the relation; admitted the practice 2026-07-17; not an authoring party to either side's assertions

non_participants.note: No reference to Ulysses in ADR 002/003 or the governance statement (swept at the pinned commits). Documented non-relation, not failure.
ADR 002/003 name field-research works as the content engine; no Ensemble object travels in this relation at the pinned commits.
